empty_project: No notes yet in this project.

favorites.hint: Pin frequent notes from a file row's more menu.

project.empty: Create a project to get started

upload.title: Upload file
upload.description: When multiple files are uploaded together, the original opens first while analysis runs in parallel in the background.
upload.drop: Drag files here or click to choose
upload.hint: PDF, documents, images, audio, video, Markdown

none.title: Analyze and save only
none.description: Add the material to the project and choose follow-up work later.

paper_analysis.title: Paper analysis report
paper_analysis.description: Prepare a long source-backed analysis report from the material.

summary.title: Summary note/report
summary.description: Turn key claims, evidence, and next actions into a document artifact.

figure.title: Figure or diagram
figure.description: Create a visual explanation of the source structure, comparison, or flow.

slides.title: Slides
slides.description: Turn the uploaded material into a presentation deck outline.

study.title: Study material
study.description: Prepare quiz, flashcard, and review-material generation from this source.

comparison.title: Compare materials
comparison.description: Read multiple sources together and summarize overlap, differences, conflicts, and follow-up questions.

data_table.title: Data table/insights
data_table.description: Extract tables, metrics, comparisons, and insights into a spreadsheet-style artifact.

paperAnalysis.prompt: Analyze uploaded source "{sourceTitle}" as a long paper analysis report.
paperAnalysis.initialPrompt: Turn uploaded source "{sourceTitle}" into a paper/source analysis report. Include core claims, method, evidence, limitations, and citation locations.

study.prompt: Create study material from uploaded source "{sourceTitle}".

comparison.initialPrompt: Compare {count} uploaded sources and summarize overlap, differences, conflicting claims, evidence strength, and follow-up questions.

figure.prompt: Create a core figure or diagram from uploaded source "{sourceTitle}".
figure.initialPrompt: Create a figure or diagram explaining the core structure, comparison, or flow in uploaded source "{sourceTitle}".

slides.prompt: Turn uploaded source "{sourceTitle}" into presentation material.
slides.initialPrompt: Turn uploaded source "{sourceTitle}" into a slide deck with a clear presentation flow.

dataTable.prompt: Extract tables and insights from uploaded source "{sourceTitle}".
dataTable.initialPrompt: Organize key items, numbers, comparison dimensions, and insights from uploaded source "{sourceTitle}" into a table.

summary.prompt: Turn uploaded source "{sourceTitle}" into a summary report.
summary.initialPrompt: Summarize uploaded source "{sourceTitle}" around core claims, evidence, and next actions.

tree_menu.empty_drop_hint: Drag items here or create a child page.
tree_menu.row_hint: Double-click to rename. Drag to move.
tree_menu.confirm_delete_body: "{label}" will be removed from the project tree.

tree.empty_project: No files or notes to show yet.
tree.error: Could not load the file list.

toasts.create_note_failed: Couldn't create the page. Please try again.
toasts.create_folder_failed: Couldn't create the folder. Please try again.
